commit.message:
Rename package from com.notification to org.notification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Grafana dashboard by setting datasource UID and enabling histogram metrics

Dashboard panels referenced datasource uid "prometheus" but the
provisioned datasource had no explicit UID. Also enabled percentiles
histogram for HTTP server requests so p95/p99 latency panels have data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Redis cache serialization by using JSON instead of JDK serializer

The default JdkSerializationRedisSerializer requires cached objects to
implement Serializable. Entity classes (User, Device, NotificationTemplate)
don't, causing every @Cacheable call to fail with SerializationException
and resulting in 100% load test failures. Switch to
GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer. Also promote load-client error
logging from DEBUG to ERROR for better visibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace wildcard imports with explicit single-class imports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add healthcheck to notification-server for load-client readiness

The load-client was starting before the notification-server Spring Boot
app was ready, causing 100% request failures. Use actuator health
endpoint as healthcheck and require service_healthy condition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Docker build by generating per-service settings.gradle

Each Dockerfile was copying the shared settings.gradle which references
all subprojects, but only one subproject's source was available during
build. Generate a minimal settings.gradle with only the target subproject.

commit.message:
fix: ClusterIP for demo-wall service + per-session ClusterRole naming

- demo-wall/base/service.yaml: LoadBalancer → ClusterIP
  Kyverno educates-environment policy blocks LoadBalancer services in
  session namespaces; ClusterIP suffices since dashboard proxy accesses
  the service cluster-internally.

- workshop.yaml: add kustomize patches to rename ClusterRole/CRB per
  session using $(session_namespace) suffix, preventing cross-session
  SharedResourceWarning and ClusterRoleBinding overwrites.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(engine): add Kleene aggregates, first/last, distinct_count, match_rate, fix trend_aggregate

Implement 5 new CEP operators as key differentiators:

- Kleene inline aggregates: sum(alias.field), avg(), min(), max(), count(alias)
  Pre-computed in pipeline.rs Sequence handler, intercepted in evaluator.rs
- first(alias)/last(alias): Return Value::Map of all fields from first/last
  Kleene-matched event. Supports member access (first(f).city) via extended
  Expr::Member evaluation
- distinct_count(alias.field): Count unique values across Kleene captures
- match_rate: Events per second within a matched sequence (match_count/duration)
- Absence/negation: Already implemented (.not(EventType)), added playground example

Fix trend_aggregate field-based aggregates (sum_trends, avg_trends, min_trends,
max_trends) which were returning placeholder values. Added FieldAggregateInfo
infrastructure to accumulate events and compute real aggregates when Hamlet emits.

Add 6 new playground examples: kleene-aggregates, first-last, distinct-count,
absence-detection, rate-detection. Update builtins.md documentation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: add release process, tag convention, and /release command

- Add Release Process section to CLAUDE.md with full step-by-step checklist
- Establish tag convention: no `v` prefix (e.g., 0.2.6 not v0.2.6)
- Create .claude/commands/release.md as a /release slash command

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fingerprinting tests (sannysoft 30/30) show all tools identical, but

loaded full search results while cdp-browser-mcp, chrome-devtools-mcp,
and Playwright MCP all hit a 503 error page — same Chrome, same IP.

commit.message:
Fix: is_anonymous always false due to wrong JWT claim key (#145)

* Dev: emulator-aware local setup via USE_FIREBASE_EMULATOR gradle property

- FirebaseConfig reads USE_FIREBASE_EMULATOR env var (set by bootRun when
  the gradle property is true) instead of FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST
- DevTokenController routes signUp to emulator REST API when emulator is active
- UserProfile: add default = "" to firebaseUid so Hibernate can construct
  the entity without a no-arg constructor plugin

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Address PR review: FirebaseAuthException handling + kotlin-jpa plugin

- AdminController: catch FirebaseAuthException and return 400 instead
  of letting it propagate as a 500
- Add kotlin-jpa plugin so Hibernate can instantiate UserProfile via
  the generated no-arg constructor; remove fragile firebaseUid = ""
  default from the @Id field

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix: read sign_in_provider from nested firebase JWT claim

The firebase claim is a nested object in the ID Token, not a flat
"firebase:sign_in_provider" key. Correctly extracts sign_in_provider
from tokenAttributes["firebase"]["sign_in_provider"] so anonymous
users are stored with is_anonymous = true.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Phase 3: L-System HTML Gallery (#12)

* Phase 2.5: CairoMakie 2D Rendering (#9)

Add CairoMakie-based 2D rendering as a package extension so the core
stays lightweight while users who `using CairoMakie` get rendering
automatically.

- Add BoundingBox2D and compute_bbox (pure, no backend needed)
- Add render2d/save_render as extension points for backend impls
- Add render_lsystem convenience pipeline (derive → interpret → render)
- Create ext/PhysisCairoMakieExt.jl using linesegments! with DataAspect
- Configure CairoMakie as weak dependency in Project.toml
- Add 45 new tests (32 render API + 13 CairoMakie integration)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Phase 3: L-System HTML Gallery

Add gallery generation script with 10 classic ABOP L-systems (Koch
Curve, Koch Snowflake, Sierpinski Triangle, Dragon Curve, 5 ABOP
plants, Hilbert Curve) rendered as SVGs with a self-contained dark-
themed HTML gallery page.

New files:
- scripts/generate_gallery.jl: Gallery definitions and HTML generation
- test/test_gallery.jl: 70 tests covering L-system derivation,
  segment generation, and gallery file output

Closes #11

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Scale gallery to 100 L-systems with category navigation

Add 90 new L-systems across 6 categories (Fractal Curves, Dragon Family,
Sierpinski Family, Space-Filling Curves, Plants & Trees, Artistic Patterns),
add category field to GalleryEntry, generate category-grouped HTML with
sticky nav bar, and update tests for count, uniqueness, and category checks.

Closes #13

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
fix: correct base URL from /med_roubst_web to /MedQ-Robust-web

The base path must match the GitHub repo name for CSS/JS assets to load correctly on GitHub Pages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: cache resolve_config_path() to avoid repeated git subprocess spawns (#80)

The function shells out to `git rev-parse --git-common-dir` on every
call. With 10 call sites (hooks, CLI, server), this spawns dozens of
subprocesses per session. The git root never changes during a process
lifetime, so lru_cache(maxsize=1) is safe and eliminates all repeated
spawns after the first call.

Closes vox-dvu.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: RAG系统第二阶段 - 角色Prompt优化

问题：
- 原有system prompt是硬编码的中文字符串
- 三个角色(researcher/worker/reporter)没有差异化
- 缺少意图分类和动态上下文格式化

解决方案（第二阶段）：
- 创建prompts.py定义三个角色的专业prompt（使用英文避免编码问题）
- 创建intent_classifier.py实现意图分类（8种类型）
- 创建prompt_templates.py为每种意图定义专用模板
- 创建context_formatter.py根据意图动态格式化上下文
- 修改api.py集成新的prompt系统

角色特点：
- researcher: 详细技术分析、数据驱动、科学术语
- worker: 清晰指导、强调安全、避免术语、行动步骤
- reporter: 高层总结、关键指标、风险等级、决策建议

意图类型：
- data_query: 数据查询
- anomaly_check: 异常检查
- trend_analysis: 趋势分析
- comparison: 数据对比
- prediction: 未来预测
- explanation: 机制解释
- operation: 操作指导
- general: 通用问题

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add COMSOL-parity physics upgrade and verification system

Phase 1: GradedMesh1D with exponential grading for efficient electrode-
  surface resolution, non-uniform Thomas algorithm, grading_factor param
Phase 2: Nernst-Planck migration via operator splitting (NernstPlanck1D,
  ElectroneutralitySolver), opt-in enable_migration flag
Phase 3: Adaptive time-stepping with Richardson error estimation and
  while_loop integration, opt-in adaptive flag
Phase 4: COMSOL verification system with 8 canonical test cases, MPh
  automation, trace comparator, and report generation
Phase 5: Reaction mechanisms (EC/ECE/EC'/EE) and RDE convection support

commit.message:
Fix push notifications: strict 100m filter using stored subscriber location

Root cause: push_subscriptions never stored lat/lng, so the Edge
Function's distance check was never executed — all subscribers
received push notifications regardless of distance.

Changes:
- push-subscribe.js: saveSubscription() now accepts lat/lng and
  writes them to push_subscriptions at subscription time
- push-subscribe.js: initPush(userId, position) accepts GPS position
  so lat/lng is saved immediately when the user first subscribes
- app.js: updatePushLocation() keeps stored lat/lng fresh —
  called on first GPS fix and debounced (30s) on position changes
- app.js: initPush() called with userPosition so lat/lng is saved
  even for users who already have a subscription
- Edge Function: distance filter changed from 50m → 100m
  (matches ALERT_RADIUS_M); subscribers without stored location
  are now skipped (previously they all received the push)
